snp5.0:5.0.976: Kosalānaṁ purā rammā,agamā dakkhiṇāpathaṁ;Ākiñcaññaṁ patthayāno,brāhmaṇo mantapāragū.
snp5.0:5.0.977: So assakassa visaye,aḷakassa samāsane;Vasi godhāvarīkūle,uñchena ca phalena ca.
snp5.0:5.0.978: Tasseva upanissāya,gāmo ca vipulo ahu;Tato jātena āyena,mahāyaññamakappayi.
snp5.0:5.0.979: Mahāyaññaṁ yajitvāna,puna pāvisi assamaṁ;Tasmiṁ paṭipaviṭṭhamhi,añño āgañchi brāhmaṇo.
snp5.0:5.0.980: Ugghaṭṭapādo tasito,paṅkadanto rajassiro;So ca naṁ upasaṅkamma,satāni pañca yācati.
snp5.0:5.0.981: Tamenaṁ bāvarī disvā,āsanena nimantayi;Sukhañca kusalaṁ pucchi,idaṁ vacanamabravi.
snp5.0:5.0.982: "Yaṁ kho mama deyyadhammaṁ,Sabbaṁ visajjitaṁ mayā;Anujānāhi me brahme,Natthi pañcasatāni me".
snp5.0:5.0.983: "Sace me yācamānassa,bhavaṁ nānupadassati;Sattame divase tuyhaṁ,muddhā phalatu sattadhā".
snp5.0:5.0.984: Abhisaṅkharitvā kuhako,bheravaṁ so akittayi;Tassa taṁ vacanaṁ sutvā,bāvarī dukkhito ahu.
snp5.0:5.0.985: Ussussati anāhāro,Sokasallasamappito;Athopi evaṁ cittassa,Jhāne na ramatī mano.
snp5.0:5.0.986: Utrastaṁ dukkhitaṁ disvā,Devatā atthakāminī;Bāvariṁ upasaṅkamma,Idaṁ vacanamabravi.
snp5.0:5.0.987: "Na so muddhaṁ pajānāti,Kuhako so dhanatthiko;Muddhani muddhapāte vā,Ñāṇaṁ tassa na vijjati".
snp5.0:5.0.988: "Bhotī carahi jānāsi,Taṁ me akkhāhi pucchitā;Muddhaṁ muddhādhipātañca,Taṁ suṇoma vaco tava".
snp5.0:5.0.989: "Ahampetaṁ na jānāmi,Ñāṇamettha na vijjati;Muddhani muddhādhipāte ca,Jinānaṁ hettha dassanaṁ".
snp5.0:5.0.990: "Atha ko carahi jānāti,Asmiṁ pathavimaṇḍale;Muddhaṁ muddhādhipātañca,Taṁ me akkhāhi devate".
snp5.0:5.0.992: So hi brāhmaṇa sambuddho,Sabbadhammāna pāragū;Sabbābhiññābalappatto,Sabbadhammesu cakkhumā;Sabbakammakkhayaṁ patto,Vimutto upadhikkhaye.
snp5.0:5.0.993: Buddho so bhagavā loke,Dhammaṁ deseti cakkhumā;Taṁ tvaṁ gantvāna pucchassu,So te taṁ byākarissati".
snp5.0:5.0.994: Sambuddhoti vaco sutvā,Udaggo bāvarī ahu;Sokassa tanuko āsi,Pītiñca vipulaṁ labhi.
snp5.0:5.0.995: So bāvarī attamano udaggo,Taṁ devataṁ pucchati vedajāto;"Katamamhi gāme nigamamhi vā pana,Katamamhi vā janapade lokanātho;Yattha gantvāna passemu,Sambuddhaṁ dvipaduttamaṁ".
snp5.0:5.0.996: "Sāvatthiyaṁ kosalamandire jino,Pahūtapañño varabhūrimedhaso;So sakyaputto vidhuro anāsavo,Muddhādhipātassa vidū narāsabho".
snp5.0:5.0.997: Tato āmantayī sisse,Brāhmaṇe mantapārage;Etha māṇavā akkhissaṁ,Suṇātha vacanaṁ mama.Yasseso dullabho loke,Pātubhāvo abhiṇhaso;
snp5.0:5.0.998: Svājja lokamhi uppanno,Sambuddho iti vissuto;Khippaṁ gantvāna sāvatthiṁ,Passavho dvipaduttamaṁ".
snp5.0:5.0.999: "Kathaṁ carahi jānemu,Disvā buddhoti brāhmaṇa;Ajānataṁ no pabrūhi,Yathā jānemu taṁ mayaṁ".
